programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several young women began turning up in shallow graves in the Alaskan wilderness. In one of the first cases of successful criminal investigative analysis, FBI profilers mapped the criminal's mind and captured the serial killer.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners
programme.desc: Remorseless murderer Casey Pigge's main ambition is to be the ultimate serial killer. If unrestrained, he remains a deadly threat.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners
programme.desc: Denver Simmons is as dangerous as he is ruthless. Incarcerated for murdering a woman and her 14-year-old son, his violence only spiraled further once he was behind bars.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners
programme.desc: Being behind bars only made Italian-American mobster Freddy Geas even more brutal.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A convicted killer serving life for manslaughter is found to be guilty of a second murder 32 years later.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.desc: Cesar Barone was an American serial killer who took the life of four women in and around Hillsboro, Oregon in the 1990s.

programme.desc: Musician and special needs teacher Jane Longhurst vanished during her day off work after making a plan to go swimming with her friend's boyfriend. Five weeks later, Jane's partially decomposed body was found burning 25 miles from Jane's home.

programme.desc: Catherine Nevin and her husband Tom were successful publicans and property developers in the Dublin and Wicklow areas. Catherine reported a break-in and violent attack at their pub one night in 1996, which left Tom dead.
